data.body: knots.ts:395-405 nextKnot() has no concurrency control. Multiple callers (terminal-manager, verification-orchestrator) can call nextKnot concurrently for the same knot, contributing to database lock contention. Should serialize calls per-knot-id to prevent concurrent kno CLI invocations from competing for the SQLite lock.
data.title: Add per-knot-id async queueing to knots.nextKnot
